task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface is visible, showing the left sidebar with channels, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the #release-updates channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '#release-updates' channel is highlighted in the left sidebar and the main chat window header displays '#release-updates'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened a thread on the correct target message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A thread panel is open on the right side of the screen. The parent message of this thread must start with the text 'Official Rocket.Chat release...'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the exact required text for the reply.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Verified: build artifacts for this release have been validated on Ubuntu 22.04 LTS and macOS 14. No regressions found in CI pipeline. Approved for staging deployment.' is visible in the thread's message input box or as a posted message in the thread.

task_completion.description: Verify the reply was actually posted to the thread.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reply message appears as a sent chat bubble within the right-side thread panel, complete with a user avatar and timestamp, rather than just sitting unsent in the text input box.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Rocket.Chat GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web or desktop interface, not terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the interaction occurred within the genuine Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The environment should clearly be the Rocket.Chat application (browser or app), not a text editor, notes app, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the message.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open or used to inject the message into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target channel is exactly 'release-updates'. The posted message in the thread must contain the following required phrases (case-insensitive): 'verified', 'ubuntu 22.04', 'no regressions', and 'staging deployment'.
